title: agnirictus agninum
intro: Agnirictus agninum, also known as Agnus Castus or Chasteberry, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Vitex genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agnirictus agninum include alleviating menstrual cramps, regulating menstrual cycles, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause. Agnirictus agninum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
